description: Black woven pouch densely covered with bright linear multicolor looped embroidery in abstract geometric motifs, finished with small tassel knots at the corners, and suspended from a thick braided strap of burgundy, olive, and cream yarns.
Soft red woolen jacquard pouch with contrasting black geometric tartan-inspired panel at the top, hanging from a braided burgundy, white, and amber strap.

Black cotton pouch embroidered with diagonal rows of variegated loop stitches in pink, orange, beige, and purple over a wavy zigzag band, topped with a compact braided orange and ivory strap and tassel ties.
Black cotton pouch featuring horizontal bands of multicolor loop embroidery and rhythmic wavy stitching, accented with abstract floral motifs, and suspended from a braided burgundy-cream strap.
Black cotton pouch embroidered with rows of stylized leaf-like loops in shades of orange, pink, purple, and cream, separated by zigzag bands, with a braided burgundy and ivory strap and tassel knots.

Black cotton pouch embroidered with rows of stylized looped floral motifs in cream, red, and pink on a black ground, set between a purple stitched top border and a wavy cream zigzag band, hanging from a burgundy-and-cream braided strap with tassel ties.

Black cotton pouch featuring a top band of multicolor diagonal loop stitches in orange, pink, purple, and cream, separated from a cream zigzag band and a lower section of abstract swirl-and-leaf embroidery, suspended from a braided neutral-tone strap.

Black cotton pouch with three horizontal panels—tulip-shaped loop motifs in yellow, cream, and pink; a wavy cream zigzag band; and a bottom panel of floral-and-spiral embroidery in cream, purple, and orange—hanging from a burgundy-and-cream braided strap.

Black cotton pouch embroidered with a top stripe of curving multicolor loops in pink, orange, and cream, a central wavy cream zigzag, and a bottom section of abstract floral-and-spiral motifs, finished with a braided burgundy-and-white strap and small tassels.
